name: b4_failover_stale_path_smoke_T1_atlanta
translation_honesty: This B4 smoke benchmark models failover as a post-failure path-liveness property. Pre-failure traffic may use the primary path. After failure, traffic should use the live backup path and must not reach the stale primary endpoint. The faulty failover update leaves a stale primary-path branch, while the control update sends post-failure traffic only to the backup path.

embedding.meaning: B4 checks stale-path behavior after failover. The primary endpoint is valid for pre-failure traffic but forbidden for post-failure traffic. The control failover update sends post-failure traffic only to the backup path. The faulty update leaves a stale primary-path branch.
